videos.video_subject: How Lamine Yamal at just 17 is already breaking records that took Messi years to reach
videos.video_script: This kid is only seventeen, and he is already breaking records that took Messi years to reach. Lamine Yamal is the youngest player ever to score in a Champions League knockout. He bends free kicks like a player twice his age. Defenders twice his size cannot get the ball off him. And he is doing all of this before he is even old enough to drive. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Lamine Yamal dribbling Barcelona, Lamine Yamal goal celebration, Lamine Yamal free kick Spain, Lamine Yamal skills close up, Lamine Yamal beating defenders, Lamine Yamal Barcelona match gameplay, Lamine Yamal Champions League goal, Lamine Yamal nutmeg, Lamine Yamal sprinting with ball, Lamine Yamal intense face
